name: Hopeless Twinkles (Hostess Twinkies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix together the cake batter ingredients: margarine, Crisco, sugar, evaporated milk, and vanilla extract.
3. Add eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract, flour, milk, butter, additional sugar, and salt to the cake batter mixture.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9 pan.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Cut the baked cake into sections.
7. Layer the sections with filling (a mixture of sugar and additional butter) and more cake batter.
8. Place back in the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
